name: mail-index
description: Local, agent-queryable Gmail intelligence — a read-only MCP server over a progressive local index of your mailbox.
long_description: mail-index keeps a local, read-only index of your Gmail (metadata-wide, bodies-narrow) and exposes it to your agent over MCP — recall and summarization across your whole mailbox without Gmail's search bar. This bundle only registers the server; you must first install the gog (or gws) adapter, authenticate a mailbox once (read-only), and run an initial sync — follow docs/agent-install.md. The server requires an existing config and will exit with a clear error if none is present. Local-first: the index never leaves your machine; read-only by default — it never sends or deletes mail, and only archives/relabels when you explicitly opt into the gmail.modify scope.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Ranked fuzzy full-text recall over the indexed mailbox.

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: One message: summary → distilled body → inline enrich; plus ocr_images/needs_ocr.

tools.name: graph_neighbors
tools.description: Nearest neighbours in the contact graph.

tools.name: interest_propose
tools.description: Suggest curation tags for a message.

tools.name: interest_set
tools.description: Save a curation tag on a message.

tools.name: interest_get
tools.description: Fetch curated tags for a message.

tools.name: save_summary
tools.description: Save an agent-written summary on a message/thread.

tools.name: digest_sources
tools.description: Summarize which accounts have new mail + trigger sync.
